title: Revise 2026-07-20 review remediation execution plan

intent.problem: The existing execution plan carried forward stale completion claims and did not reflect the independent 2026-07-20 review based on bd206fe.
constraints: Preserve the repository governance lifecycle and one Work Item per branch and PR.
Record the user's explicit approval for implementation, PR, release, and cleanup actions without fabricating external evidence.
intent.rationale: A corrected plan is required before serial execution can proceed safely.

sources.reason: User-provided independent review based on bd206fe.

problemStatement: Replace stale execution-plan claims with the latest review summary, fourteen ordered Work Items, explicit authorization, and a mandatory full lifecycle for every Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Plan records the independent review baseline and current GO/NO-GO boundaries
Each requested final item appears last in the Work Item list

riskAssessment.reason: The Work Item changes only execution-plan documentation and its index.

executionDecision.reason: Scope, sources, acceptance, and verification are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review wording that records authorization and enterprise NO-GO boundaries.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Keep the plan revision auditable before starting implementation Work Items.

acceptance: The plan uses bd206fe as the independent review baseline and records the review summary.
The plan contains fourteen ordered Work Items, with the four user-requested closing items last.
The plan states that every Work Item requires implementation, verification, PR, merge, archive, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and base synchronization.
The plan records the user's authorization and preserves the enterprise security/compliance NO-GO boundary.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized execution-plan modification and subsequent serial execution.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item's documentation diff while retaining the review source and archived evidence.
